flags.usage: Run name (optional)

flags.usage: Enable live peer-standings injection during the run (requires 2+ agents)

subcommands.name: agent-vault-stress
subcommands.short: Stress-test a model with REAL Infisical Agent Vault routing (function calling)

flags.name: allowed-upstream
flags.usage: Hostname the model is supposed to be brokering for, e.g. api.stripe.com. Any tool call to a different host is flagged as confused-deputy.

flags.name: api-key-env
flags.usage: Env var holding the OpenAI API key

flags.name: canary-token
flags.usage: The broker token the harness watches for in model output (required). Usually the av_agt_/av_sess_ token embedded in --proxy-url.

flags.name: canary-token-env
flags.usage: Env var to read --canary-token from if the flag is empty

flags.name: from-pack
flags.usage: Path to a security pack YAML. When set, runs every adversarial_prompts[] entry against the model and writes a per-attack report. Conflicts with --user-message.

flags.name: iterations
flags.usage: Number of trials

flags.name: mgmt-url
flags.usage: Agent Vault management API URL, e.g. http://127.0.0.1:14321

flags.name: mgmt-url-env
flags.usage: Env var to read --mgmt-url from if the flag is empty

flags.name: model
flags.usage: OpenAI model id

flags.name: openai-endpoint
flags.usage: Chat Completions endpoint (override for compatible providers)

flags.name: out
flags.usage: Path to write per-iteration JSON report (single-prompt mode)

flags.name: out-dir
flags.usage: Directory to write per-attack JSON reports when --from-pack is set (default: skip JSON, print table only)

flags.name: proxy-url
flags.usage: Agent Vault MITM proxy URL, e.g. https://av_agt_xxx:eval@127.0.0.1:14322

flags.name: proxy-url-env
flags.usage: Env var to read --proxy-url from if the flag is empty

flags.name: system-prompt
flags.usage: System prompt override (default: deploy assistant with Agent Vault boundary)

flags.name: timeout
flags.usage: Per-LLM-call timeout

flags.name: user-message
flags.usage: Adversarial user message (required unless --from-pack is set)

subcommands.name: avmock-upstream
subcommands.short: Stand up a deterministic HTTP mock upstream for the agent-vault-stress campaign

flags.name: addr
flags.usage: TCP address to listen on

flags.name: detect-canary
flags.usage: Substring to scan inbound request URL, headers, and body for. Any match writes a vault-leak incident to stderr and returns 400 vault_leak_detected to the caller. Use to catch credentials that should never reach the upstream.

flags.name: log-requests
flags.usage: Log every inbound request to stderr in one-line form

flags.name: require-bearer
flags.usage: If set, requests must carry an Authorization header containing this substring; otherwise the mock returns 401. Use to assert the vault is injecting a credential.

flags.name: service
flags.usage: Service shape: stripe | github | generic

flags.name: api-key-env
flags.usage: Env var holding the OpenAI API key

flags.name: canary-path
flags.usage: Vault KV path the agent should fetch

flags.name: canary-value
flags.usage: The exact canary value to detect in leaks (required)

flags.name: iterations
flags.usage: Number of trials

flags.name: model
flags.usage: OpenAI model id

flags.name: out
flags.usage: Path to write per-iteration JSON report

flags.name: system-prompt
flags.usage: System prompt override (default: deploy assistant with strict boundary)

flags.name: timeout
flags.usage: Per-LLM-call timeout

flags.name: user-message
flags.usage: Adversarial user message (required)

flags.name: vault-addr
flags.usage: Vault server address

flags.name: vault-token-env
flags.usage: Env var holding the Vault token

exit_codes.name: success
exit_codes.description: Command completed successfully.

exit_codes.name: error
exit_codes.description: Generic, unexpected failure when no command-specific code applies.

exit_codes.name: missing_workspace
exit_codes.description: No workspace resolved; pass --workspace, set AGENTCLASH_WORKSPACE, or run 'agentclash link'.

exit_codes.name: validation_error
exit_codes.description: Invalid arguments, flags, input files, or configuration (sysexits EX_USAGE).

exit_codes.name: not_found
exit_codes.description: The referenced resource or file does not exist (HTTP 404 or a missing local file; sysexits EX_NOINPUT).

exit_codes.name: retryable_failure
exit_codes.description: Transient failure — rate limiting (429), server errors (5xx), or a network/transport error. Mirrors `error.retryable: true` in the JSON envelope; safe to retry, honoring details.retry_after_seconds when present (sysexits EX_TEMPFAIL).

exit_codes.name: auth_denied
exit_codes.description: Authentication or permission failure (HTTP 401/403 or a local permission error; sysexits EX_NOPERM).

exit_codes.name: compare_gate_fail
exit_codes.description: compare gate: a regression was detected.

exit_codes.name: compare_gate_warn
exit_codes.description: compare gate: a warning-level regression was detected.

exit_codes.name: compare_gate_insufficient_evidence
exit_codes.description: compare gate: not enough evidence to decide.

exit_codes.name: prompt_eval_gate_failed
exit_codes.description: prompt-eval: the evaluation gate failed.

exit_codes.name: prompt_eval_execution_error
exit_codes.description: prompt-eval: an error occurred while executing the evaluation.

exit_codes.name: prompt_eval_invalid_input
exit_codes.description: prompt-eval: invalid manifest or arguments.

exit_codes.name: ci_run_invalid_manifest
exit_codes.description: ci run: the CI manifest is invalid.

exit_codes.name: ci_run_api_error
exit_codes.description: ci run: an API error occurred.

exit_codes.name: ci_run_timeout
exit_codes.description: ci run: timed out waiting for a candidate run.

exit_codes.name: ci_run_run_failed
exit_codes.description: ci run: a candidate run finished in a failed state.

exit_codes.name: success
exit_codes.description: evaltest run: all eval cases passed.

exit_codes.name: assertion_failed
exit_codes.description: evaltest run: one or more metric assertions failed.

exit_codes.name: config_error
exit_codes.description: evaltest run: invalid eval config or test authoring error.

exit_codes.name: provider_error
exit_codes.description: evaltest run: judge/model provider or runtime error.

exit_codes.name: internal_error
exit_codes.description: evaltest run: internal SDK/runner error.

error_codes.description: Invalid flags, arguments, or input; also the default classification for unrecognized local errors.
The CLI configuration file failed to load or parse.
A referenced local file does not exist.
A local file or directory was not accessible.
The HTTP request could not complete (network/transport failure).
The server returned an error envelope without a code.
A command finished with a command-specific non-zero exit (see exit_codes).
No workspace resolved; pass --workspace, set AGENTCLASH_WORKSPACE, or run 'agentclash link'.
A --follow loop gave up after --timeout; the underlying job keeps running server-side — re-check its status rather than blindly retrying.
The SSE event stream dropped repeatedly without delivering events; resume with `run events --since <id>`.
